value.expression: Give max 5 of today’s top motivational video content themes from TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. Output only plain text using letters and commas. No extra words, numbering, quotes, emojis, links, hashtags, line breaks, or explanations. Format strictly as: Theme1, Theme2, Theme3, Theme4, Theme5$String:Enter$

TASK[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]Write the spoken portion of a 90-second (233–266 words) vertical-video script for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP][SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]AUDIENCE & STYLE[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]• Niche: Motivation / self-improvement[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]• Tone: High-energy, encouraging, conversational (second-person “you”)[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]• Rhythm: Short, punchy sentences with strategic pauses for on-screen text sync[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP][SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]INPUT[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]Today’s key content themes:[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]>>>stringPromptGeneratorChatGPT<<<[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP][SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]OUTPUT FORMAT (no extra text)[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP](1) Topic:[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP](2) Description:[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP](3) Script:[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP](4) Quote:[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP][SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]Use exactly those four section headers, followed by their content.[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]• Topic — 3–8 words summarising the central idea.[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]• Description — 1-sentence teaser (no word-count mention).[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]• Script — Only the words to be spoken; no stage directions, hashtags or separators.[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]• Quote — End with an inspirational quote (author credited).[SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP][SHIFT DOWN]$String:Newline$[SHIFT UP]Do not output anything besides the four sections.$String:Enter$

{args.diffusion_temperature}")$String:Newline$    logger.info(f"diffusion_iterations: {args.diffusion_iterations}")$String:Newline$    logger.info(f"num_autoregressive_samples: {args.num_autoregressive_samples}")$String:Newline$    logger.info(f"cond_free: {args.cond_free}")$String:Newline$    logger.info(f"Device gewählt: {device if 'device' in locals() else 'Nicht definiert'}")$String:Newline$$String:Newline$    if not text.strip():$String:Newline$        logging.error("Textdatei ist leer.")$String:Newline$        sys.exit(1)$String:Newline$$String:Newline$    # ------------------------------------------------------$String:Newline$    #                   Hauptprozess$String:Newline$    # ------------------------------------------------------$String:Newline$$String:Newline$    try:$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        for selected_voice in selected_voices:$String:Newline$            voice_outpath = outpath $String:Newline$$String:Newline$            if '&' in selected_voice:$String:Newline$                voice_sel = selected_voice.split('&')$String:Newline$            else:$String:Newline$                voice_sel = [selected_voice]$String:Newline$$String:Newline$            voice_samples, conditioning_latents = load_voices(voice_sel)$String:Newline$            all_parts = []$String:Newline$            for j, text in enumerate(texts):$String:Newline$                if regenerate is not None and j not in regenerate:$String:Newline$                    all_parts.append(load_audio(os.path.join(voice_outpath, f'{j}.wav'), 24000))$String:Newline$                    continue$String:Newline$                gen = tts.tts_with_preset($String:Newline$                    text, $String:Newline$                    voice_samples=voice_samples, $String:Newline$                    conditioning_latents=conditioning_latents,$String:Newline$                    preset=args.preset,$String:Newline$                    k=args.candidates,$String:Newline$                    use_deterministic_seed=seed)$String:Newline$$String:Newline$                if settings is None:$String:Newline$                    settings = tts.settings$String:Newline$                    log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$                    log_header("API-PARAMETER (aus api.py)", 111)$String:Newline$                    log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$                    if settings:$String:Newline$                        for key, value in settings.items():$String:Newline$                            logger.info(f"{key}: {value}")$String:Newline$                    else:$String:Newline$                        logger.warning("Keine API-Parameter verfügbar (settings ist None).")$String:Newline$                    log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$                    log_header("Starte Generierung", 111)$String:Newline$                    log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$$String:Newline$                    logger.info(f"Wird geladen in: {voice_outpath, f'{j}.wav'}")$String:Newline$$String:Newline$                if args.candidates == 1:$String:Newline$                    audio_ = gen.squeeze(0).cpu()$String:Newline$                    torchaudio.save(os.path.join(voice_outpath, f'{j}.wav'), audio_, 24000)$String:Newline$                else:$String:Newline$                    candidate_dir = os.path.join(voice_outpath, str(j))$String:Newline$                    os.makedirs(candidate_dir, exist_ok=True)$String:Newline$                    for k, g in enumerate(gen):$String:Newline$                        torchaudio.save(os.path.join(candidate_dir, f'{k}.wav'), g.squeeze(0).cpu(), 24000)$String:Newline$                    audio_ = gen[0].squeeze(0).cpu()$String:Newline$                all_parts.append(audio_)$String:Newline$$String:Newline$            if args.candidates == 1:$String:Newline$                full_audio = torch.cat(all_parts, dim=-1)$String:Newline$                torchaudio.save(os.path.join(voice_outpath, f"{outname}.wav"), full_audio, 24000)$String:Newline$$String:Newline$            if args.produce_debug_state:$String:Newline$                os.makedirs('debug_states', exist_ok=True)$String:Newline$                dbg_state = (seed, texts, voice_samples, conditioning_latents)$String:Newline$                torch.save(dbg_state, f'debug_states/read_debug_{selected_voice}.pth')$String:Newline$$String:Newline$            if args.candidates > 1:$String:Newline$                audio_clips = []$String:Newline$                for candidate in range(args.candidates):$String:Newline$                    for line in range(len(texts)):$String:Newline$                        wav_file = os.path.join(voice_outpath, str(line), f"{candidate}.wav")$String:Newline$                        audio_clips.append(load_audio(wav_file, 24000))$String:Newline$                    audio_clips = torch.cat(audio_clips, dim=-1)$String:Newline$                    torchaudio.save(os.path.join(voice_outpath, f"{outname}_{candidate:02d}.wav"), audio_clips, 24000)$String:Newline$                    audio_clips = []$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        # ------------------------------------------------------$String:Newline$        #                 FFMPEG WAV -> MP3$String:Newline$        # ------------------------------------------------------$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$        log_header("WAV zu MP3 konvertieren mit ffmpeg", 111)$String:Newline$        log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        final_wav_path = os.path.join(outpath, f"{outname}.wav")$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        max_wait_time = 333$String:Newline$        wait_interval = 1$String:Newline$        elapsed_time = 0$String:Newline$        while not os.path.exists(final_wav_path) and elapsed_time < max_wait_time:$String:Newline$            time.sleep(wait_interval)$String:Newline$            elapsed_time += wait_interval$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        if not os.path.exists(final_wav_path):$String:Newline$            raise FileNotFoundError(f"Datei {final_wav_path} wurde nach {max_wait_time} Sekunden nicht gefunden.")$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        final_mp3_path = os.path.splitext(final_wav_path)[0] + ".mp3"$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        try:$String:Newline$            ffmpeg_exec = get_ffmpeg_executable()$String:Newline$            logger.info(f"ffmpeg verwendet: {ffmpeg_exec}")$String:Newline$$String:Newline$            subprocess.run($String:Newline$                [ffmpeg_exec, "-y", "-i", final_wav_path, final_mp3_path],$String:Newline$                check=True,$String:Newline$                stdout=subprocess.PIPE,$String:Newline$                stderr=subprocess.PIPE,$String:Newline$            )$String:Newline$            logger.info(f"Erfolgreich in MP3 konvertiert: {final_mp3_path}")$String:Newline$        except FileNotFoundError:$String:Newline$            logger.error("ffmpeg wurde nicht gefunden. Bitte sicherstellen, dass es installiert und im PATH ist.")$String:Newline$        except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e:$String:Newline$            logger.error(f"Fehler bei der MP3-Konvertierung: {e.stderr.decode()}")$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        # ------------------------------------------------------$String:Newline$        #            WAV-Dateien im Ordner löschen$String:Newline$        # ------------------------------------------------------$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$        log_header("Alle WAV-Dateien löschen", 111)$String:Newline$        log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$$String:Newline$        wav_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(voice_outpath, "*.wav"))$String:Newline$        for wav_file in wav_files:$String:Newline$            try:$String:Newline$                os.remove(wav_file)$String:Newline$                logger.info(f"WAV-Datei gelöscht: {wav_file}")$String:Newline$            except Exception as e:$String:Newline$                logger.error(f"Fehler beim Löschen von {wav_file}: {e}")$String:Newline$$String:Newline$    except KeyboardInterrupt as e:$String:Newline$        status = f"Failed: User hat abgebrochen!"$String:Newline$        logger.error(f"Failed: User hat abgebrochen")$String:Newline$    except Exception as e:$String:Newline$        status = f"Failed: {e}"$String:Newline$        with open(flag_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as ef:$String:Newline$            ef.write(str(e))$String:Newline$        logger.error(f"Fehler: {e}")$String:Newline$    finally:$String:Newline$        with open(flag_path, 'w') as f:$String:Newline$            f.write(status.strip())$String:Newline$        logger.info(f"Flag-Datei geschrieben mit Status: {status}")$String:Newline$        log_line("=", 111)$String:Newline$        log_header("Generierung abgeschlossen", 111)$String:Newline$        log_line("=", 111)
